modules.module_title: Introduction to Security & Role of a Security Officer

questions.question: Ek security officer ka primary role kya hai?

options.A: Customers ko shopping mein help karna
options.B: Mall aur uski property ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Security officer ka mukhya kaam mall aur uski property ke saath-saath logon ki suraksha karna hai.

questions.question: Professionalism maintain karne ke liye ek security officer ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Apni duties ko seriously lena aur uniform mein rehna
options.D: Apne co-workers ke saath gossip karna

questions.explanation: Professionalism ke liye apni duties ko seriously lena, uniform mein rehna, aur discipline maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek security officer ko apni duty par kya pehna chahiye?

options.B: Party wear

questions.explanation: Duty par hamesha proper uniform aur ID card pehna chahiye taaki pehchaan ho sake aur professionalism dikhe.

questions.question: Communication skills security mein kyun zaroori hain?

options.A: Sirf co-workers se baat karne ke liye
options.B: Customers, management aur emergency services se effective interaction ke liye
options.D: Social media par updates post karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective communication se customers, management aur emergency services ke saath behtar coordination hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi suspicious activity ko dekhne par pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Turant action lena aur khud handle karna
options.B: Ignore karna aur aage badh jana
options.C: Apne supervisor ko inform karna aur instructions ka wait karna
options.D: Uss activity ki video record karna aur social media par post karna

questions.explanation: Suspicious activity ko dekhne par sabse pehle apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye aur unke directions follow karne chahiye.

questions.question: Mall mein security officer ki presence ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Crime ko discourage karna aur logon ko safe feel karana

questions.explanation: Security officer ki visible presence crime ko kam karti hai aur visitors ko secure feel karati hai.

questions.question: Security logbook maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Daily activities, incidents aur observations ka record rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Logbook mein daily activities, incidents aur observations ka record rakhna reporting aur investigation ke liye useful hota hai.

questions.question: Ek security officer ko kiski property ki protection karni hoti hai?

options.B: Mall ki property, tenants ki property aur customers ki property

questions.explanation: Security officer mall, uske tenants aur visitors ki property ko protect karne ke liye responsible hai.

questions.question: Visitor management system ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: Visitors ko shopping karne se rokna
options.B: Visitors ki entry aur exit ko track karna aur security maintain karna
options.C: Visitors ko food court tak guide karna

questions.explanation: Visitor management system se visitors ki tracking hoti hai, jo security aur emergency situations mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Security officer ko public relations kaise handle karne chahiye?

options.B: Polite, helpful aur approachable rehna
options.D: Sirf apne co-workers se baat karna

questions.explanation: Ache public relations ke liye security officer ko polite, helpful aur approachable hona chahiye.

questions.question: Ek security officer ko kis tarah ki physical fitness maintain karni chahiye?

options.B: Good general fitness taaki long shifts aur emergency situations handle kar sakein
options.D: Koi physical fitness ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Security officer ko acchi physical fitness maintain karni chahiye taaki woh long shifts handle kar sake aur emergency situations mein prompt action le sake.

questions.question: Security briefing mein kya discuss kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Shift changes, specific instructions, aur any recent incidents

questions.explanation: Briefing mein shift se related zaroori jaankari, instructions aur recent incidents discuss kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek security officer ko kis tarah ke records maintain karne chahiye?

options.B: Incidents, visitor logs, patrolling reports, aur key registers

questions.explanation: Incidents, visitor logs, patrolling reports, aur key registers jaise records maintain karna security operations ke liye vital hai.

questions.question: Security team ke saath coordination kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf time pass karne ke liye
options.B: Efficient security operations aur emergency response ke liye
options.C: Ek dusre ki personal life mein interfere karne ke liye
options.D: Apni duties ko divide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Team coordination se security operations smooth hote hain aur emergency situations mein behtar response milta hai.

questions.question: Uniform pehenne ka kya mahatva hai security mein?

options.A: Sirf ek dress code follow karna
options.B: Ek professional image banana, authority dikhana aur pehchaan mein asani

questions.explanation: Uniform professionalism, authority aur easy identification provide karta hai, jo security officer ke role ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Technology ka use security mein kaise ho sakta hai?

options.B: CCTV monitoring, access control systems aur alarm systems ke through
options.C: Social media par updates check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Technology jaise CCTV, access control aur alarm systems security efficiency ko significantly boost karte hain.

questions.question: Security officer ki responsibilities mein kya shamil nahi hai?

options.B: Emergency situations handle karna
options.C: Retail store ke products ka inventory manage karna

questions.explanation: Retail store ke products ka inventory manage karna store staff ka kaam hai, security officer ka nahi.

questions.question: Access control ka main purpose kya hai?

options.A: Sabhi ko bina check kiye enter hone dena
options.B: Unauthorized individuals ko premises mein enter hone se rokna

questions.explanation: Access control ka mukhya uddeshya hai authorized logon ko hi premises mein entry dena.

questions.question: Visitor entry ke liye kya process follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Bina kisi jaanch ke entry dena
options.B: ID check karna, details record karna aur visitor pass issue karna

questions.explanation: Visitor entry ke liye ID check, details record karna aur visitor pass issue karna standard procedure hai.

questions.question: Patrolling ka primary uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Area ko monitor karna, suspicious activities identify karna aur security presence maintain karna

questions.explanation: Patrolling se area ko monitor kiya jaata hai, suspicious activities identify hoti hain aur security presence bani rehti hai.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Surveillance karna, incidents record karna aur evidence collect karna

questions.explanation: CCTV monitoring se surveillance, incident recording aur evidence collection mein help milti hai.

questions.question: Night patrolling ke dauran kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper lighting ka use karna, buddy system follow karna aur suspicious noises par dhyan dena

questions.explanation: Night patrolling mein proper lighting, buddy system aur suspicious noises par dhyan dena zaroori hai safety ke liye.

questions.question: Vehicle access control mein kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Vehicle registration, driver ID aur authorization

questions.explanation: Vehicle access control mein vehicle registration, driver ID aur authorization check karna standard procedure hai.

questions.question: Kisi unauthorized person ko entry gate par rokne ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Politely unko rokna, unki identity poochhna aur reason for entry puchhna
options.D: Unko mall ke andar jaane dena

questions.explanation: Unauthorized person ko politely rokna, identity aur entry ka reason puchhna sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Key management system kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Keys ki security, tracking aur unauthorized access rokne ke liye
options.D: Keys ko random jagah par rakhna

questions.explanation: Key management system keys ki security, tracking aur unauthorized access rokne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Random patrolling ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Predictability kam karna aur potential criminals ko confuse karna
options.C: Mall mein naye raaste explore karna

questions.explanation: Random patrolling se criminals ke liye security patterns predict karna mushkil ho jaata hai, jisse unhe discourage kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Perimeter security mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.A: Mall ke andar ki dukaanon ki security
options.B: Mall ke boundary walls, fences, gates aur entry points ki security
options.C: Mall ke food court ki security
options.D: Mall ke parking area ki security

questions.explanation: Perimeter security mein mall ki boundary, fences, gates aur entry points ko secure karna shamil hai taaki unauthorized entry roki ja sake.

questions.question: Biometric access control ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: High level of security provide karna kyuki yeh unique physical characteristics use karta hai

questions.explanation: Biometric access control unique physical characteristics jaise fingerprints ya retina scans ka use karta hai, jo high security provide karta hai.

questions.question: Exit gate par kya check karna important hai?

options.A: Logon ke shopping bags ka colour
options.B: Shoplifting ya unauthorized removal of goods ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Exit gate par checks ka uddeshya shoplifting aur unauthorized goods ke removal ko rokna hai.

questions.question: Patrolling ke dauran suspicious objects ko dekhne par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko ignore karna
options.C: Distance maintain karna, supervisor ko inform karna aur area secure karna
options.D: Uski photo lekar social media par dalna

questions.explanation: Suspicious object ko dekhne par usse door rehna, supervisor ko inform karna aur area ko secure karna priority hai.

questions.question: Security checkpoints par kya cheezein check ki jaati hain?

options.B: Bags, identity cards aur sometimes metal detection

questions.explanation: Security checkpoints par bags, identity cards aur metal detection common checks hain.

questions.question: Ek effective patrol route kaise design kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Critical areas ko cover karte hue, unpredictable patterns mein aur complete coverage ke saath
options.C: Sirf easy areas ko cover karna
options.D: Har din ek hi route follow karna

questions.explanation: Effective patrol route critical areas ko cover karta hai, unpredictable hota hai aur poore area ki coverage ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Alarm systems ka kya role hai access control mein?

options.B: Unauthorized entry ya activity detect hone par alert karna

questions.explanation: Alarm systems unauthorized entry ya activity ko detect karke security personnel ko alert karte hain.

questions.question: Mall ke loading dock area mein security measures kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Access control, CCTV surveillance aur proper documentation of goods
options.D: Loading dock ko hamesha khula rakhna

questions.explanation: Loading dock area mein access control, CCTV aur documentation zaroori hai taaki theft aur unauthorized movement roki ja sake.

questions.question: Fire alarm bajne par pehla action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Nearest emergency exit se evacuate karna

questions.explanation: Fire alarm bajne par sabse pehla kaam hai nearest emergency exit se turant evacuate karna.

questions.question: Evacuation plan ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Emergency mein logon ko safely building se nikalna
options.C: Mall ke floor plan ko show karna

questions.explanation: Evacuation plan ka uddeshya emergency mein logon ko surakshit tareeke se building se bahar nikalna hai.

questions.question: First Aid kit mein kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Bandages, antiseptic, pain relievers aur basic medical supplies

questions.explanation: First Aid kit mein bandages, antiseptic, pain relievers aur basic medical supplies honi chahiye.

questions.question: Bomb threat ki situation mein kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Calm rehna, management aur police ko inform karna, aur evacuation process start karna
options.D: Mall chhod kar ghar chale jana

questions.explanation: Bomb threat mein calm rehna, authorities ko inform karna aur evacuation process start karna sahi procedure hai.

questions.question: Medical emergency mein pehle kisko inform karna chahiye?

options.B: Supervisor aur emergency medical services (EMS) ko

questions.explanation: Medical emergency mein sabse pehle supervisor aur emergency medical services (EMS) ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Emergency exits ko hamesha clear kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency mein unobstructed escape route provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency exits ko hamesha clear rakhna zaroori hai taaki emergency mein logon ko nikalne mein koi rukawat na ho.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ka sahi use kaise karte hain?

options.B: PASS (Pull, Aim, Squeeze, Sweep) method ka use karna
options.D: Usko paani ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher ka sahi use PASS method se hota hai: Pull the pin, Aim at the base of the fire, Squeeze the handle, Sweep side to side.

questions.question: Natural disaster (e.g., earthquake) ke dauran mall mein kya procedure follow karna chahiye?

options.B: Drop, Cover, and Hold On, phir evacuation plan follow karna
options.D: Mall ke top floor par jana

questions.explanation: Earthquake jaise natural disaster mein 'Drop, Cover, and Hold On' karna aur phir evacuation plan follow karna chahiye.

questions.question: Mock drills kyun conduct kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Emergency procedures ki practice karne aur effectiveness check karne ke liye
options.D: Mall ko band karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Mock drills emergency procedures ki practice aur unki effectiveness ko check karne ke liye conduct kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Crowd control techniques ka use kab kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Jab mall mein kam log hon
options.B: Large gatherings, protests ya emergency evacuations ke dauran safety aur order maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Jab mall mein shopping festival ho

questions.explanation: Crowd control techniques ka use large gatherings, protests ya emergency evacuations mein safety aur order maintain karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Hostage situation mein security officer ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: Police aur specialized units ko support karna, area secure karna aur information provide karna
options.C: Khud hero banne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Hostage situation mein security officer ka role police ko support karna, area secure karna aur information provide karna hota hai, na ki khud negotiate karna.

questions.question: Emergency contact list mein kiski details honi chahiye?

options.B: Police, fire department, ambulance aur mall management ke key personnel
options.C: Mall ke saare shops ke owners ki details

questions.explanation: Emergency contact list mein police, fire department, ambulance aur mall management ke key personnel ke numbers hone chahiye.

questions.question: Power outage ki situation mein kya steps lene chahiye?

options.B: Emergency lighting activate karna, panic control karna aur exit routes clear rakhna

questions.explanation: Power outage mein emergency lighting activate karna, panic control karna aur exit routes clear rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hazmat (Hazardous Material) spill hone par kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Area ko isolate karna, specialized teams ko inform karna aur PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehenna agar trained ho

questions.explanation: Hazmat spill mein area ko isolate karna aur trained personnel ko inform karna sabse pehle karna chahiye. Agar trained ho to PPE ka use karein.

questions.question: Incident Command System (ICS) ka kya fayda hai emergency response mein?

options.B: Clear command structure aur coordination provide karna taaki effective response ho sake

questions.explanation: ICS ek standardized approach hai jo emergency response mein clear command structure aur coordination provide karta hai.

questions.question: AED (Automated External Defibrillator) ka use kis situation mein hota hai?

options.B: Cardiac arrest ke victims ko electric shock dene ke liye

questions.explanation: AED ka use cardiac arrest ke victims ko electric shock dekar unki heart rhythm ko restore karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Mall mein active shooter ki situation mein kya action lena chahiye?

options.A: Shooter se baat karne ki koshish karna
options.B: Run, Hide, Fight principle ko follow karna
options.D: Dusre logon ko bataana ki sab theek hai

questions.explanation: Active shooter ki situation mein 'Run, Hide, Fight' principle ko follow karna sabse effective survival strategy hai.

questions.question: Shoplifting ko rokne ka sabse common tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Customers ko mall mein enter hone se rokna
options.B: Visible security presence, CCTV monitoring aur EAS tags
options.C: Sirf female customers ko target karna

questions.explanation: Visible security presence, CCTV monitoring aur Electronic Article Surveillance (EAS) tags shoplifting rokne ke common tareeke hain.

questions.question: Internal theft se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Employees dwara ki gayi chori
options.C: Mall ke andar ki dukaanon mein chori

questions.explanation: Internal theft ka matlab hai employees dwara organization se ki gayi chori.

questions.question: CCTV footage ka use loss prevention mein kaise hota hai?

options.B: Theft aur suspicious activities ko monitor karna aur evidence collect karna

questions.explanation: CCTV footage theft aur suspicious activities ko monitor karne aur evidence collect karne mein bahut helpful hota hai.

questions.question: EAS (Electronic Article Surveillance) tags ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Unauthorized removal of goods ko detect karna aur alarm bajana

questions.explanation: EAS tags unauthorized removal of goods ko detect karte hain aur exit gate par alarm bajate hain.

questions.question: Suspicious customer behavior ko kaise identify karein?

options.B: Jo customer products ko chhupane ki koshish kare, baar-baar security ko dekhe ya bina purchase ke jaldi se exit kare
options.C: Jo customer shopping cart use kare
options.D: Jo customer phone par baat kare

questions.explanation: Suspicious customer behavior mein products ko chhupana, baar-baar security ko dekhna, bina purchase ke jaldi exit karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Inventory shrinkage kya hota hai?

options.B: Stock ka loss jo theft, damage ya administrative errors ki wajah se hota hai

questions.explanation: Inventory shrinkage stock ka loss hai jo theft, damage ya administrative errors ki wajah se hota hai.

questions.question: Loss prevention officer ka main focus kya hota hai?

options.B: Theft, fraud aur waste ko rokna

questions.explanation: Loss prevention officer ka mukhya focus theft, fraud aur waste ko rokna hota hai.

questions.question: Evidence collection mein kya steps follow karne chahiye?

options.B: Evidence ko secure karna, document karna aur chain of custody maintain karna

questions.explanation: Evidence collection mein evidence ko secure karna, document karna aur chain of custody maintain karna zaroori hai uski admissibility ke liye.

questions.question: Refund fraud ko kaise detect kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Refund patterns ko monitor karna, receipts verify karna aur suspicious return requests ko investigate karna

questions.explanation: Refund fraud detect karne ke liye refund patterns monitor karna, receipts verify karna aur suspicious requests ko investigate karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Cash handling procedures mein security ka kya role hai?

options.B: Cash ke safe transport aur storage ko ensure karna aur theft rokna

questions.explanation: Cash handling mein security ka role cash ke safe transport, storage aur theft prevention ko ensure karna hai.

questions.question: Trial room mein theft rokne ke liye kya measures le sakte hain?

options.A: Trial room ko hamesha khula rakhna
options.B: Limited number of items allow karna, regular checks karna aur CCTV monitoring (jahan permitted ho)
options.C: Trial room mein koi security nahi rakhna
options.D: Customers ko bina check kiye enter hone dena

questions.explanation: Trial room mein theft rokne ke liye limited items allow karna, regular checks aur CCTV monitoring (jahan permitted ho) effective measures hain.

questions.question: Organized retail crime (ORC) kya hai?

options.A: Ek customer dwara ki gayi chori
options.B: Criminal groups dwara bade scale par ki gayi retail theft activities
options.C: Mall ke security staff dwara ki gayi chori
options.D: Online shopping mein ki gayi chori

questions.explanation: Organized retail crime criminal groups dwara bade scale par ki gayi retail theft activities ko refer karta hai.

questions.question: Bag checking policy ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Theft ko rokna aur unauthorized items ko detect karna
options.C: Customers ke bags ko decorate karna

questions.explanation: Bag checking policy ka uddeshya theft ko rokna aur unauthorized ya suspicious items ko detect karna hai.

questions.question: Employee theft rokne ke liye kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Background checks, inventory controls, CCTV monitoring aur regular audits
options.D: Employees ko koi training nahi dena

questions.explanation: Employee theft rokne ke liye background checks, inventory controls, CCTV monitoring aur regular audits zaroori hain.

questions.question: Data breach se loss prevention mein kya connection hai?

options.B: Data breach se customer information aur financial loss ho sakta hai, jise loss prevention measures se mitigate kiya ja sakta hai
options.C: Data breach se physical theft hoti hai
options.D: Data breach se mall ki website slow ho jaati hai

questions.explanation: Data breach se confidential customer information aur financial loss ho sakta hai, aur loss prevention mein digital security measures bhi shamil hoti hain.

questions.question: Undercover security personnel ka kya role hota hai?

options.B: Discreetly suspicious activities aur theft ko observe karna aur report karna

questions.explanation: Undercover security personnel discreetly suspicious activities aur theft ko observe karte hain aur report karte hain, bina apni pehchaan bataye.

questions.question: Mall mein product display security kaise ensure karein?

options.A: Products ko aise hi chhod dena
options.B: Security cables, alarms, aur strategic placement ka use karna taaki theft mushkil ho
options.C: Products ko glass cases mein band karna
options.D: Customers ko products touch karne se rokna

questions.explanation: Product display security ke liye security cables, alarms aur strategic placement ka use kiya jaata hai taaki theft ko discourage kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek security officer ke liye good customer service kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf customers ko khush rakhne ke liye
options.B: Mall ki positive image banane, trust build karne aur conflicts ko kam karne ke liye
options.D: Apni duty ko easy banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Good customer service mall ki positive image banata hai, trust build karta hai aur conflicts ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Difficult customer ko kaise handle karein?

options.B: Calm rehna, unki baat sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution offer karna

questions.explanation: Difficult customer ko handle karne ke liye calm rehna, unki baat sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution offer karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Conflict resolution ka pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Situation ko assess karna aur calm rehna

questions.explanation: Conflict resolution ka pehla step hai situation ko assess karna aur calm rehna taaki sahi decision liya ja sake.

questions.question: Customer ki complaint ko sunte waqt kya attitude rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Attentive, patient aur empathetic

questions.explanation: Customer ki complaint ko sunte waqt attentive, patient aur empathetic attitude rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: De-escalation techniques ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Conflicting situations ko shant karna aur violence ko rokna

questions.explanation: De-escalation techniques ka fayda hai conflicting situations ko shant karna aur physical confrontation ya violence ko rokna.

questions.question: Angry customer ko shant karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Active listening, unki feelings ko acknowledge karna aur respectful tone maintain karna

questions.explanation: Angry customer ko shant karne ke liye active listening, unki feelings ko acknowledge karna aur respectful tone maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Mall mein lost child ki situation mein kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Child ko secure karna, lost and found ya designated area par le jana aur announcements karna

questions.explanation: Lost child ki situation mein child ko secure karna, designated area par le jana aur parents ko dhoondhne ke liye announcements karna chahiye.

questions.question: Customer ki privacy ka dhyaan kaise rakhein?

options.B: Personal information ko confidential rakhna aur unauthorized access se protect karna
options.C: Unki shopping habits ko note karna

questions.explanation: Customer ki privacy maintain karne ke liye personal information ko confidential rakhna aur unauthorized access se protect karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Cultural sensitivity security officer ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Diverse customer base ke saath respectful aur effective interaction ke liye
options.C: Apne culture ko promote karne ke liye
options.D: Dusre cultures ko judge karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cultural sensitivity diverse customer base ke saath respectful aur effective interaction ke liye zaroori hai, taaki misunderstandings se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Verbal abuse ka saamna karne par kya response dena chahiye?

options.B: Calm rehna, professional tone maintain karna aur supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Verbal abuse ka saamna karne par calm rehna, professional tone maintain karna aur supervisor ko inform karna sahi response hai.

questions.question: Customer ko directions dete samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Clear, concise aur accurate directions dena

questions.explanation: Customer ko directions dete samay clear, concise aur accurate directions dena chahiye.

questions.question: Public relations security officer ke role mein kaise shamil hai?

options.B: Har interaction mein mall ki positive image represent karna aur community trust build karna
options.C: Mall ke events ko promote karna
options.D: Security policies ko public mein discuss karna

questions.explanation: Security officer ki har public interaction mall ki image ko affect karti hai, isliye positive public relations maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Body language ka conflict resolution mein kya role hai?

options.B: Non-verbal cues ke through trust build karna aur situation ko de-escalate karna

questions.explanation: Positive body language (jaise open posture, eye contact) trust build karti hai aur conflict resolution mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Intoxicated person ko mall se kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Politely request karna ki woh mall chhod dein, agar zaroori ho toh management ya police ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Intoxicated person ko politely mall chhodne ke liye kehna chahiye, aur agar woh cooperate na karein toh management ya police ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Complaint ko record karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Investigation, resolution aur future reference ke liye
options.D: Dusre logon ko bataane ke liye

questions.explanation: Complaint ko record karna investigation, resolution aur future reference ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Security officer ko public feedback par kaise react karna chahiye?

options.B: Feedback ko politely sunna, usse seekhna aur improvements ke liye use karna
options.C: Feedback dene wale se argue karna
options.D: Sirf positive feedback ko accept karna

questions.explanation: Public feedback ko politely sunna, usse seekhna aur improvements ke liye use karna professional approach hai.

questions.question: Private security officer ke paas arrest karne ki kya power hoti hai?

options.B: Limited power, typically citizen's arrest (agar offence non-bailable aur cognizable ho) ya authorized by law
options.D: Sirf minor offences ke liye arrest power

questions.explanation: Private security officers ke paas citizen's arrest ki limited power hoti hai, jo IPC (Indian Penal Code) ke तहत दी गई है, aur specific situations mein hi applicable hoti hai.

questions.question: FIR (First Information Report) kab file ki jaati hai?

options.B: Kisi cognizable offence ke baare mein police ko inform karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf apne personal issues ke liye

questions.explanation: FIR ek cognizable offence ke baare mein police ko inform karne ke liye file ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Use of force ke rules kya hain?

options.B: Force sirf tab use karna jab absolutely zaroori ho, aur proportionate ho threat ke
options.D: Force ko entertain karne ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: Use of force tabhi allowed hai jab absolutely zaroori ho aur threat ke proportionate ho.

questions.question: Incident report mein kya details honi chahiye?

options.B: Date, time, location, involved parties, witnesses, detailed description of incident aur actions taken

questions.explanation: Incident report mein date, time, location, involved parties, witnesses, detailed description aur actions taken ki jaankari honi chahiye.

questions.question: Legal compliance security officer ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Legal issues se bachne, professionalism maintain karne aur company ki reputation protect karne ke liye
options.C: Apne kaam ko mushkil banane ke liye
options.D: Sirf court mein jane ke liye

questions.explanation: Legal compliance legal issues se bachne, professionalism maintain karne aur company ki reputation protect karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Evidence ko preserve karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Usko asli haalat mein rakhna taaki court mein use kiya ja sake aur investigation mein help mile

questions.explanation: Evidence ko preserve karna zaroori hai taaki woh court mein admissible ho aur investigation mein helpful ho.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko legal evidence ke roop mein kaise use karte hain?

options.B: Properly record karna, chain of custody maintain karna aur authorized personnel dwara present karwana
options.D: Footage ko public mein release karna

questions.explanation: CCTV footage ko legal evidence ke roop mein use karne ke liye use properly record karna, chain of custody maintain karna aur authorized personnel dwara present karwana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Trespassing kya hota hai?

options.A: Kisi ki property par allowed hona
options.B: Unauthorized tareeke se kisi ki property mein enter karna ya rehna
options.C: Kisi ki property mein shopping karna

questions.explanation: Trespassing ka matlab hai unauthorized tareeke se kisi ki property mein enter karna ya rehna.

questions.question: Self-defense ke legal limits kya hain?

options.B: Force ka use proportional hona chahiye threat ke, aur sirf tab jab self-defense zaroori ho
options.D: Attack khatam hone ke baad bhi force use karna

questions.explanation: Self-defense mein force ka use proportional hona chahiye threat ke, aur sirf tab jab self-defense absolutely zaroori ho.

questions.question: Data Protection Act ka security officer ke role par kya asar hai?

options.B: Personal data ko legally aur securely handle karna, aur privacy rights ka samman karna

questions.explanation: Data Protection Act security officers ko personal data ko legally aur securely handle karne aur privacy rights ka samman karne ke liye guide karta hai.

questions.question: False arrest se bachne ke liye kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.A: Bina kisi reason ke arrest karna
options.B: Arrest se pehle proper evidence aur legal grounds ensure karna, aur training follow karna
options.C: Sirf शक ke aadhar par arrest karna

questions.explanation: False arrest se bachne ke liye proper evidence aur legal grounds ensure karna aur training guidelines follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Court mein testimony dete waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Sach bolna, clear aur concise rehna, aur sirf facts par stick karna

questions.explanation: Court mein testimony dete waqt sach bolna, clear aur concise rehna, aur sirf facts par stick karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Daily activity report (DAR) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Shift mein ki gayi sabhi activities, observations aur incidents ka record rakhna

questions.explanation: DAR shift mein ki gayi sabhi activities, observations aur incidents ka detailed record provide karta hai.

questions.question: Security officer ko kis tarah ke legal documents ki jaankari honi chahiye?

options.B: Relevant sections of IPC, CrPC, Private Security Agencies (Regulation) Act, aur company policies

questions.explanation: Security officer ko IPC, CrPC, Private Security Agencies (Regulation) Act aur company policies jaise relevant legal documents ki jaankari honi chahiye.

questions.question: Discrimination ke against rules ka security officer ke role par kya asar hai?

options.B: Sabhi individuals ke saath fair aur equal treatment provide karna, bina kisi bhedbhav ke
options.C: Sirf specific groups ko favor karna
options.D: Apne personal biases ko follow karna

questions.explanation: Discrimination ke against rules ke तहत security officer ko sabhi individuals ke saath fair aur equal treatment provide karna chahiye.

questions.question: Incident reporting software ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Efficient reporting, data analysis, aur quick communication of incidents

questions.explanation: Incident reporting software efficient reporting, data analysis aur quick communication of incidents mein help karta hai.
